---
title: "data exploration"
format: pdf
---

# Packages

```{r}
#| label: packages

# data wrangling and visualization
library(tidyverse)

# allows file paths to work across computers
library(here)

# formatting axis labels
library(scales)

# working with dates
library(lubridate)
```

# Data

```{r}
#| label: data

# read in bird survey data
birds <- read.csv(here("data", "birds.csv"))

# read in NOAA weather data
weather <- read.csv(here("data", "NOAA_daily_summaries.csv"))
```

# Cleaning Data

```{r}
#| label: cleaning-birds

birds_clean <- birds |> 
  # convert observation date to date format
  mutate(
    observation_date = ymd(observation_date),
    
    # create monthly grouping variable
    month = floor_date(observation_date,
                       unit = "month")
  ) |> 
  
  # filter to only include waterfowl observations
  filter(
    e_bird_group == "Waterfowl",
    
    # remove repeat observations
    repeat_observation == "No",
    
    # keep observations within study period
    observation_date > ymd("2019-09-30"),
    observation_date < ymd("2025-10-01")
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: cleaning-weather

weather_clean <- weather |> 
  
  # convert date column to date format
  mutate(
    DATE = ymd(DATE),
    
    # create monthly grouping variable
    month = floor_date(DATE,
                       unit = "month")
  ) |> 
  
  # filter to study period
  filter(
    DATE > ymd("2019-09-30"),
    DATE < ymd("2025-10-01")
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: joining-data-frames

# join bird and weather data by exact date
bird_weather <- full_join(
  x = birds_clean,
  y = weather_clean,
  
  # match bird observation dates to weather dates
  by = c("observation_date" = "DATE")
) |> 
  
  # keep only variables of interest
  select(
    observation_date,
    season,
    species,
    count,
    PRCP
  )
```

# Summaries

```{r}
#| label: monthly-precipitation

# calculate total monthly precipitation
monthly_precip <- weather_clean |> 
  
  # group observations by month
  group_by(month) |> 
  
  # sum precipitation within each month
  summarize(
    monthly_prcp = sum(PRCP, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    # remove grouping after summarizing
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: monthly-waterfowl-abundance

# calculate monthly abundance by species
monthly_waterfowl <- birds_clean |> 
  
  # group by month and species
  group_by(month, species) |> 
  
  # sum bird counts within each month
  summarize(
    abundance = sum(count, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    # remove grouping after summarizing
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: total-monthly-waterfowl

# calculate total monthly waterfowl abundance
total_monthly_waterfowl <- birds_clean |> 
  
  # group by month
  group_by(month) |> 
  
  # sum all bird counts within each month
  summarize(
    total_abundance = sum(count, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    # remove grouping after summarizing
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

# Joining data

```{r}
#| label: joining-monthly-data

# join monthly bird abundance with monthly precipitation
bird_weather_monthly <- total_monthly_waterfowl |> 
  
  # join by month
  left_join(monthly_precip,
            by = "month") |> 
  
  # arrange chronologically
  arrange(month) |> 
  
  # create lagged precipitation variable
  mutate(
    
    # previous month's precipitation
    lagged_prcp = lag(monthly_prcp)
  )
```

# trying visualizations

## Figure 1: Monthly Precipitation Through Time

```{r}
#| label: figure-1-precipitation
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 5

ggplot(data = monthly_precip,
       
       # x-axis = month
       # y-axis = total monthly precipitation
       mapping = aes(x = month,
                     y = monthly_prcp)) +
  
  # create line graph
  geom_line() +
  
  # add plot labels
  labs(
    title = "Monthly Precipitation Through Time",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Monthly precipitation"
  )
# saving figure 1 to figures folder
ggsave(
  filename = here("figures", "monthly-precipitation.png"),
  width = 10,
  height = 5
)

```


## Figure 2: Waterfowl Abundance Through Time

```{r}
#| label: figure-2-waterfowl
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 6

ggplot(data = monthly_waterfowl,
       
       # x-axis = month
       # y-axis = abundance
       # fill by species
       mapping = aes(x = month,
                     y = abundance,
                     fill = species)) +
  
  # create stacked area chart
  geom_area() +
  
  # add plot labels
  labs(
    title = "Monthly Waterfowl Abundance Through Time",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Monthly abundance",
    fill = "Species"
  )
# saving figure 2 to figures folder
ggsave(
  filename = here("figures", "waterfowl-abundance.png"),
  width = 10,
  height = 6
)
```

## Figure 3: Lagged Precipation vs Water

```{r}
ggplot(data = bird_weather_monthly,
       mapping = aes(x = lagged_prcp,
                     y = total_abundance,
                     color = month)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.8, size = 4) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(
    name = "Month",
    option = "turbo",
    breaks = 1:12,
    labels = c("Jan", "Feb", "Mar", "Apr", "May", "Jun",
               "Jul", "Aug", "Sep", "Oct", "Nov", "Dec")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Relationship Between Precipitation and Waterfowl Abundance",
    x = "Previous month's precipitation (mm)",
    y = "Total monthly waterfowl abundance (individuals)",
    caption = "Each point represents one month's waterfowl abundance plotted against the previous month's precipitation"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_family = "Georgia") +
  theme(
    legend.key.height = unit(1.5, "cm"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11, family = "Georgia"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", family = "Georgia"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", family = "Georgia"),
    plot.caption = element_text(size = 9, color = "gray50", family = "Georgia"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 11, family = "Georgia"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10, family = "Georgia")
  )
# saving figure 3 to figures folder
ggsave(
  filename = here("figures", "precipitation-abundance.png"),
  width = 7,
  height = 5
)
```

## Potential figure 4 — average abundance across seasons with scaled precipitation line

```{r}
#|: label: seasonal-summary

seasonal_summary <- bird_weather_monthly |> 
  
  # creating season variable from month
  mutate(
    season = case_when(
      month(month) %in% c(12, 1, 2) ~ "Winter",
      month(month) %in% c(3, 4, 5) ~ "Spring",
      month(month) %in% c(6, 7, 8) ~ "Summer",
      TRUE ~ "Fall"
    ),
  # order seasons logically
    season = factor(season,
                    levels = c("Winter", "Spring", "Summer", "Fall"))
  ) |> 
  
  # summarize across all years
  group_by(season) |> 
  summarize(
    
    # average total waterfowl abundance per month in each season
    avg_abundance = mean(total_abundance, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    # average monthly precipitation in each season
    avg_precip = mean(monthly_prcp, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    .groups = "drop"
  )
  
```

```{r}
#| label: figure-4-seasonal-abundance-precip
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 5

# scaling factor so precipitation can be layered on abundance axis
precip_scale <- max(seasonal_summary$avg_abundance, na.rm = TRUE) /
  max(seasonal_summary$avg_precip, na.rm = TRUE)

ggplot(data = seasonal_summary,
       mapping = aes(x = season)) +
  
  # bar chart for average abundance
  geom_col(mapping = aes(y = avg_abundance)) +
  
  # precipitation line scaled to abundance axis
  geom_line(mapping = aes(y = avg_precip * precip_scale,
                          group = 1),
            linewidth = 1) +
  
  # points on precipitation line
  geom_point(mapping = aes(y = avg_precip * precip_scale),
             size = 3) +
  
  # add primary and secondary y-axis
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "Average monthly waterfowl abundance",
    sec.axis = sec_axis(
      trans = ~ . / precip_scale,
      name = "Average monthly precipitation"
    )
  ) +
  
  # add plot labels
  labs(
    title = "Average Waterfowl Abundance and Precipitation by Season",
    x = "Season"
  )
```
